name: wf-mcp-local
description: Local development bundle for the wf-mcp workflow/proxy server.
long_description: Runs the wf-mcp server from the local lda-workflow-as-struct checkout over stdio. This bundle is for local testing with Claude Desktop, not a self-contained distribution. It uses the config file in the checkout; that config owns store_root, connections, and reload behavior.

tools.name: search_tools
tools.description: Search the wf-mcp tool catalog when search mode is enabled.

tools.name: call_tool
tools.description: Call a discovered proxied tool by name when search mode is enabled.

tools.name: wf_workflow_list_capabilities
tools.description: MCPB-safe preview name for runtime tool wf.workflow.list_capabilities.

tools.name: wf_workflow_call_capability
tools.description: MCPB-safe preview name for runtime tool wf.workflow.call_capability.
